3284330.name: Grym: Knights in the Garden
3284330.description:
ONWARD AGAINST THE DARKNESS 
Brace yourself and your friends as you venture into the wilderness, seeking glory in this forsaken land

• A Mysterious and Atmospheric Realm, Filled with Secrets and Danger

Explore the sprawling lands of golden fields, ruins of antiquity, final bastions of a holy order and a sea of twisting wilderness filled with the resources to sustain your survival and the demonic entities who wish to ensure it's end.

• Face a Variety of Demons and Foes

A looming threat of demonic forces lie in wait each night during your travels. Prepare yourself to fight or run for your life (and valuables). The deeper you explore the world, the stranger and more terrific creatures and artefacts you may encounter.

• Arm Yourself with the Best or the Most Fashionable

Don't be caught dead without the best weapons, armor, potions and trinkets you can get your grubby little hands on. There are many enemies to defeat or even just survive, between your return to the safety of the Church's halls. Discover, buy, craft, sell and improve a long list of weapons and apparel to maintain general "aliveness" and appear elegant between your journeys. 

• Esoteric Secrets Await your Curiosity 

Use your wits and your lantern to navigate the haunting world and piece together the fragments of this worlds grace. Will you make it whole again? Or weave an even denser web with the trail you leave behind?

• Journey Alongside Friends or in Solace

Gather any friend, acquaintance or stranger you can. Every extra torch and sword helps.
